    Index

    A B C D E F G H I K L M N P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    addAnimal(Animal) - Method in class Location
    Method to add an animal to this location.
    addAnimalSighted(Animal) - Method in class TourSummary
    Records a sighted animal and adds its species name if not already recorded.
    addKilledAnimal(Animal) - Method in class TourSummary
    Adds a killed animal to the list if it is not null.
    addLocationVisited(Location) - Method in class TourSummary
    Marks the location as visited, increments the locations visited counter, and adds its animal count to the total.
    AggressionLevel - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that stores the constant aggression level values for safari animals.
    Animal - Class in Unnamed Package
    This class represents one individual animal in the safari simulation.
    Animal() - Constructor for class Animal
    Default constructor initializes an Animal object with default values.
    Animal(int, Species, boolean, boolean) - Constructor for class Animal
    Parameterized constructor initializes an Animal object with given values.
    AnimalTest - Class in Unnamed Package
    Test class for Animal class.
    AnimalTest() - Constructor for class AnimalTest
    Default constructor for AnimalTest.
    AnimalType - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that stores constant animal type values for the safari simulation.

    B

    BIRD - Static variable in class AnimalType
    Constant representing a bird, directly access by class name.

    C

    calculateRating() - Method in class TourSummary
    Calculates and returns the tour success rating as a percentage.
    CARNIVORE - Static variable in class Diet
    Constant representing a carnivore diet.
    countKilledSpecies(Species) - Method in class TourSummary
    Counts the number of killed animals belonging to the specified species.
    countSpecies(Species) - Method in class Location
    Method to count the number of animals at specific location that belong to the specific species.
    countSpotted(Species) - Method in class Location
    Counts the number of spotted animals at this location belonging to the specified species.

    D

    Diet - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that stores constant dietary type values for the safari simulation.
    Diprotodon - Class in Unnamed Package
    Diprotodon is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Diprotodon() - Constructor for class Diprotodon
    Constructor to initialize Diprotodon species name.
    DIPROTODON - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Diprotodon species.
    displayEndOfVisit(Location, int, int, int, int) - Method in class Megafauna
    Displays the report at the end of every visit.
    displayLocations(ArrayList) - Method in class Megafauna
    Method to display a formatted table showing each suitable location with animal count.
    displayWelcome() - Method in class Megafauna
    Displays the welcome message.
    doesPredatorAttack(String) - Method in class RandomSafariEvent
    Method returns true if a spotted predator attacks a tourist.

    E

    endTour() - Method in class Megafauna
    Displays the reason of tour ended as per tour simulation status.
    EXTREME - Static variable in class AggressionLevel
    Constant represen an extreme aggression level.

    F

    FileIO - Class in Unnamed Package
    FileIO class handles all file input and output operations for the safari simulation.
    FileIO() - Constructor for class FileIO
    Default constructor initialises the FileIO object.

    Genyornis - Class in Unnamed Package
    Genyornis is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Genyornis() - Constructor for class Genyornis
    Constructor to initialize Genyornis species name.
    GENYORNIS - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Genyornis species.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class Diprotodon
    Method to return aggression level of Diprotodon Species.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class Genyornis
    Method to return aggression level of Genyornis Species.

    Method to return aggression level of Megalania Species.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class Procoptodon
    Method to return aggression level of Procoptodon Species.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class Species
    Accessor method returns the aggression level of the species.

    Method to return aggression level of Thylacoleo Species.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class UnknownSpecies
    Method to return unknown aggression level.
    getAggressionLevel() - Method in class Wonambi
    Method to return aggression level of Wonambi Species.
    getAnimals() - Method in class Location
    Accessor method to return the list of animals at this location.
    getDeaths() - Method in class TourSummary
    Accessor method to return the number of tourist deaths.
    getDiet() - Method in class Diprotodon
    Method to return diet of Diprotodon Species.
    getDiet() - Method in class Genyornis
    Method to return diet of Genyornis Species.
    getDiet() - Method in class Megalania
    Method to return diet of Megalania Species.
    getDiet() - Method in class Procoptodon
    Method to return diet of Procoptodon Species.
    getDiet() - Method in class Species
    Accessor method returns the diet of the species.
    getDiet() - Method in class Thylacoleo
    Method to return diet of Thylacoleo Species.
    getDiet() - Method in class UnknownSpecies
    Method to return unknown diet.
    getDiet() - Method in class Wonambi
    Method to return diet of Wonambi Species.
    getIdentity() - Method in class Animal
    Accessor method returns the identity of the animal.
    getInjuryOutcome() - Method in class RandomSafariEvent
    Returns a random integer between 0 and 99 to determine the outcome of a predator attack on a tourist.
    getInjuryStatus() - Method in class Tourist
    Accessor method returns the tourist's injury status.
    getLocationNumber() - Method in class Location
    Accessor method to return the location number.
    getLocations() - Method in class FileIO
    Method to return all locations created from the sighting file.
    getLocationsVisited() - Method in class TourSummary
    Accessor method to return the number of locations visited.
    getMajorInjuries() - Method in class TourSummary
    Accessor method to return the number of major injuries.
    getMinorInjuries() - Method in class TourSummary
    Accessor method to return the number of minor injuries.
    getName() - Method in class Species
    Accessor method returns the name of the species.
    getNumberOfAnimals() - Method in class Location
    Accessor method to return the total number of animals at this location.
    getRiskLevel() - Method in class Tour
    Accessor method to return the risk level of the tour.
    getSpecies() - Method in class Animal
    Accessor method returns the Species object of the animal.
    getSpotted() - Method in class Animal
    Returns whether the animal has been spotted.
    getSuitableLocations() - Method in class Megafauna
    Returns all locations that are both suitable for the selected tour and have not yet been visited.
    getTouristId() - Method in class Tourist
    Accessor method returns the tourist's ID.
    getTourType() - Method in class Tour
    Accessor method to return the type of the tour.
    getType() - Method in class Diprotodon
    Method to return Animal type of Diprotodon Species.

    Method to return Animal type of Genyornis Species.

    Method to return Animal type of Megalania Species.

    Method to return Animal type of Procoptodon Species.

    Accessor method returns the type of the species.

    Method to return Animal type of Thylacoleo Species.
    getType() - Method in class UnknownSpecies
    Method to return unknown Animal type.
    getType() - Method in class Wonambi
    Method to return Animal type of Wonambi Species.
    GiantsTrail - Class in Unnamed Package
    GiantsTrail is a medium-risk safari tour and a concrete implementation of the Tour class.
    GiantsTrail() - Constructor for class GiantsTrail
    Constructor initializes Giants Trail tour with medium risk.

    H

    handleAttack(Animal) - Method in class Megafauna
    Method to handle one predator's attack on the first tourist in the group.
    HERBIVORE - Static variable in class Diet
    Constant representing a herbivore diet.

    I

    inflictMajorInjury() - Method in class Tourist
    Method to apply a major injury to the tourist.
    inflictMinorInjury() - Method in class Tourist
    Method to apply a minor injury to the tourist.
    Input - Class in Unnamed Package
    Input class reads and validates all user input for the safari simulation.
    Input() - Constructor for class Input
    Default constructor creates a Scanner object for reading input from the keyboard.
    isAlive() - Method in class Animal
    Accessor method returns whether the animal is alive.
    isAlive() - Method in class Tourist
    Accessor method returns whether the tourist is alive.
    isAnimalSpotted() - Method in class RandomSafariEvent
    Method returns true if an animal is spotted by the tourists.
    isLocationSuitable(Location) - Method in class GiantsTrail
    Method to determine whether a location is suitable for tour.
    isLocationSuitable(Location) - Method in class MegafaunaMeander
    Method to determine whether a location is suitable for this tour.
    isLocationSuitable(Location) - Method in class PredatorZone
    Method to determine whether a location is suitable for this tour.
    isLocationSuitable(Location) - Method in class Tour
    Abstract method to determine the location according to Tour.
    isNonNegativeNumber(int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a number is non-negative (zero or greater).
    isPredator() - Method in class Diprotodon
    Method to returns predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class Genyornis
    Method to returns predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class Megalania
    Method to returns predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class Procoptodon
    Method to returns predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class Species
    Accessor method returns whether the species is a predator.
    isPredator() - Method in class Thylacoleo
    Method to returns predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class UnknownSpecies
    Method to return default predator status.
    isPredator() - Method in class Wonambi
    Method to returns predator status.
    isValidAggressionLevel(String) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if an aggression level matches a known aggression constant.
    isValidAnimal(Animal) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if an animal object is not null.
    isValidDiet(String) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a diet matches a known diet constant.
    isValidIdentity(int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if an identity number is valid.
    isValidLocationChoice(int, int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a location choice is within the available range.
    isValidLocationNumber(int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a location number is valid (greater than 0).
    isValidName(String) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a name is valid (not null and not blank).
    isValidSightingLine(String[]) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a sighting line has the correct number of fields (exactly 6).
    isValidSpecies(Species) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a species object is not null.
    isValidTourChoice(int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a tour choice is valid (between 1 and 3 inclusive).
    isValidTouristCount(int) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if a tourist count is valid (between 1 and 4 inclusive).
    isValidType(String) - Static method in class Validation
    Checks if an animal type matches a known type constant.
    isVisited() - Method in class Location
    Accessor method to check whether the location visited.

    K

    kill() - Method in class Tourist
    Method to kill the tourist by setting their alive status to false.
    killAnimal() - Method in class Animal
    Marks the animal as dead by setting alive status to false.

    L

    loadData() - Method in class Megafauna
    Loads locations and animals from sighting.txt via FileIO.
    Location - Class in Unnamed Package
    Location class represent a safari location that can be visited during a tour.
    Location() - Constructor for class Location
    Default constructor initializes a location with default values.
    Location(int) - Constructor for class Location
    Parameterized constructor initializes a location with a specific location number, false visit status and empty animal list.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class AnimalTest
    Main method creates an AnimalTest object and runs all test cases.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class Megafauna
    Main method creates a Megafauna object and starts the simulation.
    MARSUPIAL - Static variable in class AnimalType
    Constant representing a marsupial, directly access by class name.
    Megafauna - Class in Unnamed Package
    This is main controller class for the Megafauna Safari Simulation.
    Megafauna() - Constructor for class Megafauna
    Default constructor initialises default objects and empty lists.
    MegafaunaMeander - Class in Unnamed Package
    Megafauna Meander class is a low-risk type of safari tour.
    MegafaunaMeander() - Constructor for class MegafaunaMeander
    MegafaunaMeander is a low-risk safari tour and a concrete implementation of the Tour class.
    Megalania - Class in Unnamed Package
    Megalania is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Megalania() - Constructor for class Megalania
    Constructor initializes Megalania species name.
    MEGALANIA - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Megalania species.
    MODERATE - Static variable in class AggressionLevel
    Constant represents a moderate aggression level.

    N

    NONE - Static variable in class AggressionLevel
    Constant represents no aggression.

    P

    PASSIVE - Static variable in class AggressionLevel
    Constant represents a passive aggression level.
    PredatorZone - Class in Unnamed Package
    PredatorZone is a high-risk safari tour and a concrete implementation of the Tour class.
    PredatorZone() - Constructor for class PredatorZone
    Constructor initializes Predator Zone tour with high risk.
    Procoptodon - Class in Unnamed Package
    Procoptodon is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Procoptodon() - Constructor for class Procoptodon
    Constructor to initialize Procoptodon species name.
    PROCOPTODON - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Procoptodon species.

    R

    RandomSafariEvent - Class in Unnamed Package
    RandomSafariEvent generates random outcomes for events during the safari simulation.
    RandomSafariEvent() - Constructor for class RandomSafariEvent
    Default constructor initializes a RandomSafariEvent object.
    readFile() - Method in class FileIO
    Reads the sighting file and populates the locations list with animals.
    readLocationChoice(int) - Method in class Input
    Method to read and validate entered location choice by user.
    readNumberOfTourists() - Method in class Input
    Method to read and validate the number of tourists from the user.
    readTourChoice() - Method in class Input
    Method to read and validate the entered tour choice.
    recordTouristOutcome(Tourist) - Method in class TourSummary
    Records the outcome of a tourist by reading their injury and alive status directly from the Tourist object.
    REPORT_FILE - Static variable in class FileIO
    Constant to store the output file containing Megafauna safari tour summary.
    REPTILE - Static variable in class AnimalType
    Constant representing a reptile, directly access by class name.
    riskLevel - Variable in class Tour
    Stores the risk level of the tour.
    runTest() - Method in class AnimalTest
    Runs required test cases for the Animal class.

    S

    setAlive(boolean) - Method in class Animal
    Mutator method sets the alive status of the animal.
    setAlive(boolean) - Method in class Tourist
    Mutator method sets the tourist's alive status.
    setIdentity(int) - Method in class Animal
    Mutator method sets the identity of the animal.
    setInjuryStatus(String) - Method in class Tourist
    Mutator method sets the tourist's injury status.
    setLocationNumber(int) - Method in class Location
    Mutator method to set the location number.
    setName(String) - Method in class Species
    Mutator method sets the name of the species.
    setRiskLevel(String) - Method in class Tour
    Mutator method to set the risk level of the tour.
    setSpecies(Species) - Method in class Animal
    Mutator method sets the Species object of an animal.
    setSpotted(boolean) - Method in class Animal
    Sets the spotted status of the animal.
    setTouristId(int) - Method in class Tourist
    Mutator method sets the tourist's ID.
    setTourType(String) - Method in class Tour
    Mutator method to set the type of the tour.
    setupTour() - Method in class Megafauna
    Displays tour options, reads the guide's choice and initialises TourSummary.
    setupTourists() - Method in class Megafauna
    Method to prompt the number of tourists for safari.
    setVisited(boolean) - Method in class Location
    Mutator method to set the visit status of this location.
    SIGHTING_FILE - Static variable in class FileIO
    Constant to store the input file containing animal sightings.
    simulate() - Method in class Megafauna
    Method to run the full simulation i.e.
    Species - Class in Unnamed Package
    Abstract Species class represents a megafauna species in the safari simulation.
    Species() - Constructor for class Species
    Default constructor initializes a Species object with default values.
    Species(String) - Constructor for class Species
    Parameterized constructor initializes a Species object with species name.
    SpeciesData - Class in Unnamed Package
    SpeciesData class stores predefined instances of all safari species.
    startTour() - Method in class Megafauna
    Tour simulation loop.

    T

    Thylacoleo - Class in Unnamed Package
    Thylacoleo is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Thylacoleo() - Constructor for class Thylacoleo
    Constructor to initialize Thylacoleo species name.
    THYLACOLEO - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Thylacoleo species.
    toString() - Method in class Animal
    Returns the animal details as a String.
    toString() - Method in class Location
    ToString method to return the location details as a formatted String.
    toString() - Method in class Species
    Returns the species details as a formatted String.
    toString() - Method in class Tour
    To String method to return the tour details as a formatted String.
    toString() - Method in class Tourist
    Returns the tourist's details as a formatted String.
    toString() - Method in class TourSummary
    ToString method to return a formatted summary of the tour statistics, including injuries, deaths, species sighted, animals killed, and the success rating.
    Tour - Class in Unnamed Package
    Abstract Tour class represents a safari tour in the simulation.
    Tour() - Constructor for class Tour
    Default constructor initializes the tour with default values.
    Tour(String, String) - Constructor for class Tour
    Parameterized constructor initializes a tour with the specified tour type and risk level.
    Tourist - Class in Unnamed Package
    Tourist class represents a tourist participating in the safari simulation.
    Tourist() - Constructor for class Tourist
    Default constructor initialises a Tourist with default values.
    Tourist(int) - Constructor for class Tourist
    Parameterized constructor initialises a Tourist with the given ID.
    TourSummary - Class in Unnamed Package
    TourSummary records and summarises the safari tour data.
    TourSummary(int) - Constructor for class TourSummary
    Constructor initializes the tour summary with the original tourist count.
    tourType - Variable in class Tour
    Stores type of tour.

    U

    UNKNOWN - Static variable in class AggressionLevel
    Constant represents an unknown aggression level.
    UNKNOWN - Static variable in class AnimalType
    Constant representing an unknown animal type, directly access by class name.
    UNKNOWN - Static variable in class Diet
    Constant representing an unknown diet.
    UnknownSpecies - Class in Unnamed Package
    UnknownSpecies is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    UnknownSpecies() - Constructor for class UnknownSpecies
    Constructor initializes unknown species.

    V

    Validation - Class in Unnamed Package
    Utility class that provides static validation methods for the safari program.
    visitLocation(Location) - Method in class Megafauna
    Simulates visiting one location and tracking TourSummary.

    W

    Wonambi - Class in Unnamed Package
    Wonambi is a concrete implementation of the Species class.
    Wonambi() - Constructor for class Wonambi
    Constructor to initialize Wonambi species name.
    WONAMBI - Static variable in class SpeciesData
    A globally accessible instance of the Wonambi species.

    Method to write Tour summary report to tour.txt file.
